Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Giselle Casey #8098.
Ryan Dahm, Esq. appeared for plaintiff EIS, Inc. a corporation FKA Electrical Insulation Suppliers, DBA Cobra Wire & Cable.
Order waiving appearance of live testimony of witness is in file.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Eddy Dominguez, Ind. and dba Champion Telecom, Inc. as follows:
Damages/Principal - $37,432.62
Prejudgment Interest - $1,723.68
Attorney's Fees - $4,000.00.
Costs - $638.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $43,794.80.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Continued To Aug-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RYAN L. DAHM OF THE COOK COLLECTION ATTORNEYS, TEL. NO. 1-415-989-4730 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
EDDY DOMINGUEZ, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff EIS, Inc.'s application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment as to defendant Eddy Dominguez is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =302/hk
